## Documentation and localization

- [ ] Updated relevant docs, or explained why docs are not needed
- [ ] Checked whether `README.md`, `README.en.md`, and `README.ja.md` need matching updates
- [ ] Updated release notes or roadmap when appropriate

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No real API keys, tokens, auth files, private prompts, logs, or runtime SQLite files are included
- [ ] Dashboard/API exposure, worker execution, and tool permission changes are documented if affected
- [ ] Sandbox changes keep mock/local-safe behavior as the default
- [ ] The PR is focused and avoids unrelated formatting churn
